item.title: Citigroup’s plan to survive AI aftershocks: Bet on bonds and small-cap stocks
item.description: Smaller companies, cyclicals and bonds will help protect investors in a market that’s teeming with AI uncertainties, says Citigroup.

item.title: My wife’s credit-card payment is three months overdue. As an authorized user, am I in trouble?
item.description: “All correspondence regarding the account was sent to my wife’s email.”

item.title: ‘Borderline hoarder’: Tori Spelling says her $12,000-a-month rental where she lives with her 5 kids is a mess
item.description: TV personality Tori Spelling has admitted that she is living like a “borderline hoarder,” and that she no longer feels comfortable having people visit...

item.title: United Airlines’ best loyalty perks will soon be reserved for its cardholders. Is the card worth it?
item.description: Frequent flyers who hold a United Airlines co-branded credit or debit card can soon earn up to twice as many miles as noncardholders, effectively rewa...

item.title: People still want to see BTS and Harry Styles concerts, lifting Live Nation’s sales
item.description: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation Entertainment on Thursday reported fourth-quarter sales that topped Wall Street’s expectations, helped by bigger shows...
